meta.title: Crypto Invoicing — Get paid from abroad in USDC. No hidden spreads.
meta.description: Your client pays in USDC. We convert at the best market rate and you receive funds in your bank account in 2–4 business hours. Tax-ready invoices auto-generated.
meta.ogTitle: Get paid from abroad. Legal. Without losing 4%.
meta.ogDescription: USDC invoicing for LATAM freelancers. Best-rate FX, tax-ready PDFs, non-custodial.
meta.twitterDescription: USDC invoicing for LATAM freelancers. Best-rate FX, tax-ready PDFs, non-custodial.

hero.h1Line1: Get paid from abroad in USDC.
hero.subtitle: Your client pays in USDC. We convert at the best market rate and you get funds in your local bank in 2–4 business hours. Tax-ready PDFs and monthly reports generate themselves. Your accountant thanks you.
hero.trustLine: Non-custodial · Safe multisig on Base · CNV/VASP · Sumsub KYC

problem.h2Suffix: to spreads, fees and manual filings.
problem.lead: Your client pays in dollars. By the time it lands in your account, it's fewer pesos than the number on the invoice. And you still have to file the receipt.

cards.title: The gap nobody shows you.
cards.body: Lemon, PayPal, the banks — each one keeps a slice of the conversion. It's not a line-item fee, it's just a worse rate.

cards.title: Fees to receive, convert, transfer.
cards.body: PayPal charges 4.4%. Payoneer stacks its fee on top of the bank spread. Every hop in the chain takes a point.

cards.title: Receipt, monthly report, Lemon screenshots.
cards.body: Every month: copy amounts into a spreadsheet, calculate the rate, fill in the PDF, send it to your accountant. One hour you repeat twelve times a year.

how.lead: No wallet install, no private keys, no need to understand crypto. Your client pays via a link; you receive in your local bank.

steps.title: Create the link
steps.body: Client, USD amount, description. Tax-ready PDF pre-built in the draft.

steps.title: Client pays USDC
steps.body: They get the link by email. Pay from Coinbase, Metamask or any exchange. They don't need to know what Base is.

steps.title: We convert at best rate
steps.body: Binance P2P + Bybit + 4 other sources. Automatic routing. You see the rate and the source before accepting.

steps.title: Pesos in your bank
steps.body: ARS to your CBU or BRL via Pix. PDF ready to download. Monthly report generated.

calc.h2: How much are you losing per year with your current method?
calc.lead: Calculate the exact difference between what you pay today and what you'd pay with Crypto Invoicing. Live data from CriptoYa, no tricks.
calc.footnote: CriptoYa spreads · 24-month average · Doesn't include reverse-FX costs.

features.lead: A work tool, not a wallet. Designed so you open it once a week and everything's ready.

items.title: Auto invoice PDF
items.body: Tax-ready PDF generated per operation. Download it, send to client, archive.

items.title: Monthly filing report
items.body: RG 5642/2025 format. Monthly and yearly PDFs. Regenerable whenever your accountant needs.

items.title: Multi-rate routing
items.body: 6 sources queried per operation. Binance P2P primary, Bybit backup, automatic fallback.

items.title: Full audit trail
items.body: Every state — with timestamp, tx hash on Base, bank-transfer receipt.

items.title: Telegram support
items.body: Our bot + human ops. Average response under 30 min in ART business hours.

items.title: Non-custodial
items.body: Safe multisig on Base. You sign, we co-sign. Money never lives in our balance sheet.

trust.lead: Architecture decisions are deliberately boring. That's what separates a work tool from a Twitter promise.

cards.title: Non-custodial Safe multisig
cards.body: Your funds flow through a multi-sig Safe on Base. Public on-chain audit. We never hold full custody.

cards.title: Circle USDC
cards.body: Audited stablecoin, monthly reserve reports. Compatible with Coinbase, Metamask, every exchange. 1 USDC = 1 USD.

cards.title: Sumsub KYC · CNV registered
cards.body: ID verification in 5 minutes. Registered with the CNV under the PSAV regime. Your accountant can verify the entity.

cards.title: AFIP / ARCA compliant
cards.body: Factura E, monthly filing RG 5642/2025, CSV/PDF formats accepted by Tango, Colppy and AFIP web. For Brazil, conversion-only beta — Receita ↦ 2027.

pricing.lead: Start free with per-transaction commission. Switch to Pro when automated reports save you more than the plan costs.

starter.tagline: No subscription. No minimums. Pay only when you get paid.

pro.tagline: For freelancers invoicing more than USD 1,000/month. Pays for itself in month one.
pro.guarantee: 30-day money-back · if you don't save 1.5% vs Lemon we refund the plan.

faq.lead: What freelancers from Sysarmy, DevsAR and Frontend Cafe ask us the most. If yours is missing, write us.

items.q: Is it legal to receive crypto in Argentina?
items.a: Yes. Crypto Invoicing is registered with the CNV as a Virtual Asset Service Provider (PSAV), under the current regime. Each operation generates an export-services receipt (Factura E) and is reported automatically to the monthly filing (RG 5642/2025). Your accountant processes it like any other foreign income.

items.q: Does my client need to understand crypto?
items.a: Barely. You send them a link, they pay from Coinbase, Metamask, or any exchange they already use. If they've never used USDC, we send them a 2-minute guide. Most US/EU clients already have Coinbase.

items.q: What if USDC depegs from the dollar?
items.a: USDC has reserves audited monthly by Circle, a company registered in the EU and US. During the brief March 2023 depeg (Silicon Valley Bank), parity returned in under 48h. For conversions we use the peso/USDC price at the exact moment your client pays — you see the rate before accepting.

items.q: How long until the money lands?
items.a: Between 2 and 4 business hours from when the USDC enters our Safe on Base. Off-hours payments process at next business-day open. Status is live in the dashboard with a timestamp at every stage.

items.q: What about the receipt if I'm in a low Monotributo category?
items.a: We generate Factura E (export of services) for every Monotributo category and Responsable Inscripto. The system validates your tax status with AFIP before issuing each invoice. If you're near your category limit, we warn you.

USDC → BRL conversion works fully. What's in beta is the Receita Federal integration (NFe, DeCripto), planned for 2027. Today we generate a generic transactions PDF that your accountant processes manually. We open BR beta only if the waitlist exceeds 100 freelancers.

finalCta.sub: Manual onboarding with the founder in 24h. No waitlist. No credit card to register.
finalCta.disclaimer: Not financial or tax advice. Consult your accountant.

footer.about: I'm a gringo living in Buenos Aires. My partner Diana is an Argentine designer who loses money to Lemon every month. That's why I built it.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Continue with Google or drop your email — we'll send a magic link. No password.
signup.successBody: We sent an access link to {email}. Click it to open your dashboard.
signup.errorBody: Network failed. Try again, or write hola@cryptoinvoicing.co.
signup.footnote: By continuing you accept our terms. We never share your email.
signup.footnoteWithLinks: By creating your account you agree to our <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>. We never share your email.
signup.errorEmailFormat: That email looks invalid or too long. Double-check it.
signup.errorEmailServiceUnavailable: Email service is busy. Try again in a few minutes.
signup.errorNetwork: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
signup.errorUnexpected: Something unexpected went wrong. Try again.
signup.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again in {seconds}s.

dashboard.body: Your first-invoice flow lives here in Q1. Manual onboarding for the first 50 freelancers — we'll write you to schedule a 15-min call.
dashboard.ctaHint: Q1 concierge mode: founder onboards manually. Click to request a 15-min call.
dashboard.ctaHintAfter: Check your Telegram or email within 24h.
dashboard.ctaHintError: Couldn't send the request. Try again or email hola@cryptoinvoicing.co.
dashboard.hero: Fill the form to request your first invoice. We provision a USDC payment address on Base mainnet, you share it with your client, and pesos / reais land on your bank within 2–4 business hours after payment. First 50 freelancers — manual onboarding by the founder.

form.title: Request an invoice
form.subtitle: We provision the USDC payment address and email you the shareable link within 4 business hours.
form.clientEmailHint: Optional. We send them the payment link directly if you provide it.
form.descriptionHint: Visible on the invoice PDF and AFIP / Receita filings.
form.footnote: Not a final invoice — we review every request manually during Q1.
form.errAmount: Amount must be a positive number.
form.errGeneric: We could not save your request. Try again or email hola@cryptoinvoicing.co.
form.spoofingWarning: That email uses our domain. Make sure it's intentional.

list.title: Your requests
list.empty: No invoice requests yet. Submit one above and it will appear here.
list.error: We couldn't load your requests. Try again.

profile.title: Your payout profile
profile.subtitle: We need this to settle your local currency. It is stored on your account and never shared with your client.
profile.payoutPlaceholder: Where you receive pesos (CBU, CVU or alias)
profile.errSave: We couldn't save your profile. Try again.
profile.incomplete: Complete your payout profile so we can settle your first invoice.
profile.payoutHint: Where we settle your local currency: bank CBU, wallet CVU (MercadoPago) or alias.

callback.errorNoSession: No code or session found in callback URL.

consent.title: Cookies & analytics
consent.body: We use essential cookies to make the site work, and — only if you accept — anonymous analytics to understand what breaks and what works. No third-party trackers.

legalLanguageBanner.title: English only
legalLanguageBanner.body: These legal documents are published in English while we finalise the AR-lawyer redline. A Spanish (rioplatense) version will be added after the review.
